long_headlines.text: Private, offline document Q&A and semantic vector search natively on Apple Silicon.
Scale dynamically from the 3B Core model to Private Cloud Compute for massive contexts.
Verify answers instantly with exact token packing, BM25 extraction, and cited chunks.

descriptions.text: Search vast document archives with hardware-accelerated local vector similarity.
Verify assertions and trace source highlights with secure Private Cloud Compute routing.
Local SQLite FTS5 and Metal-accelerated embeddings deliver uncompromised search privacy.
